ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate. */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being estimated. */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the estimate was made. */,
  "year_estimate" INTEGER /* Year(s) of the population estimate. */,
  "population_at_site" TEXT /* Population count of the species at the site. */,
  "iba_criteria" TEXT /* IBA criteria triggered by the species. */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation site. */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the population estimate. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_iba_criteria FOREIGN KEY ("iba_criteria") REFERENCES iba_criteria ("criteria_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES observation_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iucn_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IUCN category. */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the IUCN category. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status. */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the IUCN category. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season. */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., breeding). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season. */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season. */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation site. */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation site. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site. */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the observation site. */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site. */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iba_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IBA criteria. */,
  "criteria_code" TEXT /* Code for the IBA criteria (e.g., A1). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IBA criteria. */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the IBA criteria. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist). */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role. */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system. */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit). */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event. */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation. */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being observed. */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation site. */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the observation was made. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation. */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the observation. */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_observations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES observation_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation action. */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species related to the action. */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken. */,
  "date_initiated" TEXT /* Date when the action was initiated. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the action. */,
  "responsible_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the action. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_actions_responsible_user FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat. */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, wetland). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat. */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the habitat. */,
  "water_availability" TEXT /* Availability of water in the habitat. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological factor. */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecological factor. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecological factor. */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the ecological factor on bird populations. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_ecological_factors" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species. */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecological factor. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_action_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome. */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conservation action. */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome. */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was achieved. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_action_outcomes_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES conservation_actions ("action_id")
)
